text: Stepping back from the glass wall of a meeting room filled with quiet focus, I feel as though I am on the threshold between two worlds—the world of practical discourse and the world of contemplation. The gentle hum of collaboration is comforting, yet as I turn to the R+D exhibition, my mind pivots from the immediate to the abstract. Here, ideas are the true occupants. The vibrant wall celebrates the collective search for knowledge. Surrounded by such dedication to research and innovation, I feel a blend of curiosity and hope, energized by humanity’s endless drive to understand and connect with what is yet unknown.
